title: Crispy Garlicky Flax Eggs Wrap
description: A quick and satisfying vegan breakfast wrap that uses flax eggs for a creamy texture, infused with garlic for an extra savory kick.

ingredients.name: 1/2 cup (70g) almond butter or vegan spread
ingredients.notes: Use only for spreading, not filling the wrap.

ingredients.name: 1 can (355ml) water-based tomato sauce or vegan pasta sauce

instructions: Blend the flax eggs with water until smooth.
Heat a few drops of olive oil in a pan over medium heat. Add the chopped onion and sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add minced garlic to the pan; cook for another minute until fragrant but not browned.
Pour in the flax egg mixture, lemon juice, salt, and pepper. Stir well and let simmer for a few minutes or until thickened slightly.
Transfer the sauce into a bowl, cover it with plastic wrap, pressing on top to prevent a skin from forming, then refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
Preheat your oven to 200°C (400°F). Place tortillas between two sheets of parchment paper and bake until lightly toasted, about 1-2 minutes. Remove from the oven and cool slightly before using.
On a wrap, layer tomato sauce, flax egg mixture, chopped parsley, and finely chopped onion. Drizzle with more olive oil for extra flavor.

Heat a pan over medium-high heat. Add enough vegetable oil to coat the bottom of the pan. Once hot, carefully place wraps in the pan and cook until golden brown on both sides, about 1-2 minutes per side.
Serve warm or at room temperature with additional fresh herbs for garnish.
